metadata.description: Name of the Log Analytics workspace where Microsoft Sentinel is deployed.

properties.displayName: RetailShield - Data Exfiltration via Alternative Protocol
properties.description: Detects large-volume outbound data transfers from retail endpoints to external destinations over non-standard ports. Queries RetailShield_Logs_CL for Data_Exfiltration events with high DataTransferredMB_d or SuspicionScore_d, sourced from the RetailShield log generator. Aligned with MITRE T1048 — Exfiltration Over Alternative Protocol.
